title: Business growth
summary: 9609 AS — internal vs external growth, mergers, takeovers, and integration types.
learningObjectives: Analyse motives for mergers and takeovers.

simpleExplanation.title: Getting bigger
simpleExplanation.summary: Internal growth is organic — new products, markets. External growth merges with or acquires other firms.
steps: Horizontal: same industry stage — market share.
Vertical: supplier or customer — supply chain control.
Diseconomies of scale if growth too fast.

sections.content: **Business growth** (1.3.3) is core **Paper 1** analysis. Name **integration type** and **two motives** for every merger example.
